declarations.name: ZagController
srOnly
declarations.default: css` .sr-only { position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0; margin: -1px; overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0 0 0 0); white-space: nowrap; border: 0; } `

declarations.name: reducedMotion
declarations.default: css` @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { :host { transition: none !important; animation: none !important; } } `

declarations.description:
<vds-button> — accessible button (WAI-ARIA AP 1.2 button pattern).

Form-associated: when `type="submit"` or `type="reset"` and placed inside a `<form>`,
the click submits/resets the form.
declarations.name: VdsButton

declarations.description: <vds-card> — surface container with optional elevation and structured slots.
declarations.name: VdsCard

declarations.description:
<vds-checkbox> — tri-state checkbox (WAI-ARIA AP 1.2 § Checkbox).

Form-associated. Keyboard: Space toggles.
declarations.name: VdsCheckbox

declarations.description:
<vds-dialog> — modal dialog (WAI-ARIA AP 1.2 Dialog Modal pattern).

- role="dialog", aria-modal="true"
- Focus trapped inside while open
- Esc closes
- Backdrop click closes (unless modal)
- Restores focus to trigger on close
declarations.name: VdsDialog

declarations.description:
<vds-label> — accessible form-field label.

Mirrors HTML `<label for="">` semantics. When `for=` matches a sibling form
control, clicks on the label focus that control (browser default).
declarations.name: VdsLabel

declarations.description:
<vds-menu> — Menu Button + Menu (WAI-ARIA AP 1.2 Menu Button pattern).

Use <vds-menu-item> as children. The trigger is provided via slot="trigger".
Arrow keys navigate items; Enter/Space activates; Esc closes; type-ahead supported.
declarations.name: VdsMenu

events.description: dispatched when an item is activated, detail { value }
events.name: vds-select

declarations.description: <vds-option> — option for <vds-select>. Slot project the label.
declarations.name: VdsOption

declarations.description:
<vds-select> — select-only combobox (WAI-ARIA AP 1.2 § Combobox, select-only).

Children: <vds-option value="..."> elements. Form-associated.
Keyboard: Enter/Space toggles open. ArrowDown/Up to navigate. Esc closes. Type-ahead supported.
declarations.name: VdsSelect

declarations.description:
<vds-switch> — toggle switch (WAI-ARIA AP 1.2 § Switch).

Form-associated. Keyboard: Space and Enter toggle.
declarations.name: VdsSwitch

declarations.description:
<vds-table> — semantic table wrapper. Renders inside a `<table>` and applies
theme-token styling. Use standard `<thead>`, `<tbody>`, `<tr>`, `<th>`, `<td>`
inside.
declarations.name: VdsTable

declarations.description:
<vds-separator> — visual divider between sections.

WAI-ARIA: when `decorative=true`, role=presentation (no semantic). When false, role=separator.
declarations.name: VdsSeparator

declarations.description:
<vds-tabs> — WAI-ARIA AP 1.2 Tabs pattern.

Children: <vds-tab value="x"> and <vds-tab-panel value="x">.
Arrow keys navigate. Auto-activation by default; manual via `activation="manual"`.
declarations.name: VdsTabs

events.description: dispatched on active tab change with detail { value }
events.name: vds-change

declarations.description:
<vds-text-field> — text input with label, helper, error states. WAI-ARIA AP 1.2 textbox pattern.
Form-Associated Custom Element via ElementInternals.
declarations.name: VdsTextField

declarations.description:
<vds-toast> — single toast notification (live region pattern).

Use programmatically via <vds-toast-group>.publish(), or place declaratively.
declarations.name: VdsToast

declarations.description:
<vds-toast-group> — toast container with positioning and queue.

Programmatic use:
  const group = document.querySelector('vds-toast-group');
  group.publish({ title: 'Saved', tone: 'success' });
declarations.name: VdsToastGroup

declarations.description:
<vds-tooltip> — non-interactive descriptive tooltip (WAI-ARIA AP 1.2 § Tooltip).

Trigger: focus or hover on the slotted trigger element. Esc dismisses.
Renders a tip that is `role=tooltip` and is referenced by `aria-describedby`.
declarations.name: VdsTooltip

slots.description: the element that triggers the tooltip
slots.name: trigger
